metadata.note: Point labels are derived from public map search and manual review. Replace with official NUS GIS building centroids for production.

properties.name: School of Design and Environment 4
properties.ai_summary: Live realtime endpoint is available for SDE4.
properties.suggested_action: Use this building as the first live EMIS mapping case.

properties.name: Engineering E4
properties.source_note: Mapbox/Nominatim road-address match near Engineering Drive 4
properties.ai_summary: Observed demand is above the laboratory baseline during a period with moderate weather influence.
properties.suggested_action: Check extended equipment operation and high-load ventilation schedules.

properties.name: Central Library
properties.source_note: Nominatim: Central Library, Kent Ridge Crescent
properties.ai_summary: Demand is near the library baseline and is expected to increase in the late afternoon.
properties.suggested_action: Review study-area occupancy and cooling schedule during peak hours.

properties.name: Yusof Ishak House
properties.source_note: Nominatim: Yusof Ishak House, Central Square
properties.ai_summary: Demand is consistent with student activity and food-service operation.
properties.suggested_action: Track evening load after activity areas close.

properties.name: University Sports Centre
properties.source_note: Nominatim: University Sports Centre, Sports Drive
properties.ai_summary: Demand is below the sports facility baseline and solar output offsets part of daytime load.
properties.suggested_action: Maintain pool and hall schedule coordination.

properties.name: NUS Business School
properties.ai_summary: Demand follows the normal teaching-day profile and is not flagged by the current baseline.
properties.suggested_action: Use class schedule data to refine late-afternoon forecast.

properties.name: Science S16
properties.ai_summary: Laboratory demand is close to the AI flag threshold because night setback is limited.
properties.suggested_action: Review after-hours ventilation and plug-load schedules.

properties.name: Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine
properties.source_note: Nominatim: Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine, Medical Drive
properties.ai_summary: Demand is above the healthcare district baseline and peak forecast remains high.
properties.suggested_action: Check continuous operation loads and chilled-water control sequence.

properties.name: Stephen Riady Centre
properties.source_note: Nominatim: Stephen Riady Centre, College Avenue West
properties.ai_summary: Mixed-use demand is within expected range, with evening activity likely to extend the load profile.
properties.suggested_action: Compare food-service and event schedules with evening demand.

properties.name: UTown Residence
properties.ai_summary: Residential demand follows the expected morning and evening pattern.
properties.suggested_action: Use resident engagement messages during evening peak periods.

properties.name: Ridge View Residential College
properties.ai_summary: Residential load is below the peer baseline and cooling demand is stable.
